The '''Simus Minor system''' was a four-orbit system that contained the planet of [[Muskree]]. The system was an hour off the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]], located beyond the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

{{System-stub}}
